description: Content Radar — monitoring config for Edu's LinkedIn content intelligence system
note: Seed accounts from Edu expanded into a curated 50+ account list across AI, VC, founders, and operators. Use all accounts for monitoring — don't limit to seeds only.

x_accounts._note: All handles to monitor for high-engagement posts (last 4h window). Edu's 10 seed accounts marked with [seed].

ai_researchers.name: François Chollet
ai_researchers.note: AI researcher, Keras creator. High signal on AI reasoning debates.

ai_researchers.name: Ethan Mollick
ai_researchers.note: Wharton professor. Best signal on AI + business impact.

ai_researchers.name: Simon Willison
ai_researchers.note: LLM tools/prompting researcher. Excellent practical AI takes.

ai_content_creators.name: Matthew Berman
ai_content_creators.note: AI content creator. High-volume, early on new model releases. [seed]

ai_content_creators.name: Peter Steinberger
ai_content_creators.note: iOS dev turned AI tools builder. Technical + founder lens. [seed]

ai_content_creators.name: Shawn Wang (swyx)
ai_content_creators.note: AI developer content. 'AI engineer' framing pioneer.

ai_content_creators.name: Rowan Cheung
ai_content_creators.note: The Rundown AI. 500k+ followers. First to cover new tools.

ai_content_creators.name: Ben Tossell
ai_content_creators.note: No-code/AI tools builder. Good on practical AI use cases.

ai_content_creators.name: Pieter Levels
ai_content_creators.note: Indie hacker. Viral on AI + solo founder narrative.

ai_content_creators.name: Dan Shipper
ai_content_creators.note: Every platform CEO. AI x writing/knowledge work.

vcs_investors.note: Social Capital. High-signal macro + startup takes. [seed]

vcs_investors.note: VC + AI policy. Currently US AI/Crypto czar. [seed]

vcs_investors.note: YC President. Very active. Series A lens.

vcs_investors.name: Naval Ravikant
vcs_investors.note: AngelList. Philosophy + wealth creation. Viral constantly.

vcs_investors.name: Jason Calacanis
vcs_investors.note: Angel investor, TWIST host. Opinionated. Volume posts.

vcs_investors.name: Andreessen Horowitz
vcs_investors.note: Official a16z. High-quality long-form content drops.

vcs_investors.name: Brad Feld
vcs_investors.note: Foundry Group. Startup community and mental health.

founders_operators.note: HubSpot co-founder. Top LinkedIn creator for founders. [seed]

founders_operators.note: Box CEO. B2B SaaS + AI hot takes.

founders_operators.note: SaaStr founder. SaaS metrics, founder advice, sales.
